description_md: Per-cruise reference (natural key YYYY-MM-NODC + date_ym + ship) enriched in release_database.qmd with year/month/ship_name/ship_nodc and per-dataset event counts (distinct root sampling events for ichthyo bottle CTD and DIC) computed from the consolidated obs and sample. Folds in the former cruise_summary. Used by the CalCOFI cruises Shiny app.

Geometries for ancillary spatial layers (CA jurisdictions NOAA boundaries marine protected areas etc.) keyed by layer + feature_id. Sourced from metadata/spatial_layers.csv. Companion to _spatial_attr.
Non-geometry attributes for features in _spatial in long form (layer feature_id attr_name attr_value). Allows attribute schemas to differ across layers without column proliferation.

Consolidated occurrence-headline observations across every dataset in tidy long form (one scalar per row) with realm (env or bio) and dataset_key provenance. Carries a namespaced sample_key (dataset:type:id) grid_key cruise_key position/time/depth taxon_id + life_stage for biology measurement_type/value/qual/prec and a computed H3 hex_id. Replaces the per-dataset {ds}_measurement tables. Environmental CTD comes via the thinned ctd_thin; full scans live in obs_ctd_full.

Unified sampling-event dimension (adjacency list) spanning every dataset with one row per physical event (site tow net cast bottle underway transect region_pool). parent_sample_key + root_sample_key encode the site to tow to net and cast to bottle hierarchies without attribute inheritance. Holds position/time/depth and geometry and subsumes the per-dataset event tables (site tow net casts ctd_cast dic_sample and the various *_tow and *_sample tables).

Sub-occurrence (bin count) frequency distributions within a taxon-occurrence such as ichthyoplankton larval body_length and developmental stage distributions. Linked to obs by sample_key + taxon_id + life_stage with bin_value bin_label and count. A core table generalized for future size-spectra datasets.

Event-level effort measurements that apply to all taxa in a sampling event such as net volume_sampled std_haul_factor prop_sorted and plankton biomass plus bottle cast conditions. Tidy long form keyed by sample_key and stored once per event (not repeated per taxon).

Supplemental full-resolution CTD scans (~216M rows) with the same schema as obs and all realm=env dataset_key=calcofi_ctd-cast. Opt-in for deep CTD work; the default obs carries CTD via the thinned ctd_thin. Overlap rule: for full resolution filter CTD out of obs and UNION obs_ctd_full (never sum both).
